Digital Product Collaboration

STRATEGY & MONETIZATION
PARTNERSHIP

An interactive overview of the collaboration agreement between the Operator (Strategy & Monetization Partner) and the Creator (@nooor_tate).

Review Responsibilities Calculate Splits

Co-Created Product Suite

The digital products designed, built, and optimized by the Operator for the Creator's audience.

Noor AI Clone

An interactive AI persona trained on the Creator's specific knowledge base, voice, and positioning to engage and educate the audience 24/7.

Food Macros Scanner

A computer vision utility tool allowing followers to scan food items instantly to catalog proteins, carbohydrates, fats, and overall calories.

Fridge Scan to Meal Ready

Smart image scanning of fridge contents that auto-suggests immediate recipes, matching ingredients, and cooking instructions.

75% / 25%

Revenue Split

Creator receives 75% and Operator receives 25% of net revenues after platform fees.

14 Days

Pre-Launch Timeline

Fast-paced, dedicated strategy and setup phase to optimize the digital product launch.

100% Owner

Audience & Brand

Creator retains full ownership of their Instagram audience and individual brand identity.

Roles & Responsibilities

Track tasks for both sides. Check them off to visualize launch readiness and alignment.

Alignment & Readiness Score Proactively completing tasks ensures a successful launch.
0%
OPERATOR

Strategy & Monetization Partner

Manages positioning, systems, copy, and optimization.

CREATOR

@nooor_tate

Manages audience engagement, authenticity, and promotion.

Timeline & Launch Roadmap

A detailed look at the 14-day pre-launch and active launch strategy. Click each phase to view details.

Days 1 - 4 • Research & Positioning

Market Analysis & Positioning Strategy

This phase is dedicated to laying a bulletproof foundation for the digital product. The operator digs deep into the pain points of @nooor_tate's audience, analyzing what they need most and which formats are most appealing.

Operator Responsibilities
  • Conduct detailed pain-point analysis for Instagram audience.
  • Establish product positioning, naming, and structural outline.
  • Draft Initial Monetization Plan.
Creator Responsibilities
  • Provide raw insights, experience, and knowledge.
  • Engage in preliminary talks about product direction.
  • Run natural audience polls to test interests.
Days 5 - 9 • Creation & Copy

Copywriting & Content Infrastructure

Here we build the actual messaging and sales structures. The Operator writes the conversion copy for landing pages and promotional stories while the digital product delivery systems are established.

Operator Responsibilities
  • Draft high-converting story sequences and sales copy.
  • Build digital delivery system and structure layout templates.
  • Coordinate digital asset assembly.
Creator Responsibilities
  • Review and provide feedback on positioning and tone of copy.
  • Record assets (photos/videos) needed for marketing copy.
  • Setup Whop, Gumroad, or Etsy marketplace account under Creator's name.
Days 10 - 13 • Audience Warm-up

Warm-Up Campaign & Marketplace Configuration

The warm-up sequence begins. We prep the audience by raising awareness about the pain point without explicitly selling, building high-intent anticipation before launch day.

Operator Responsibilities
  • Deploy story templates, Q&A prompts, and feedback analysis tools.
  • Configure final links, platform integrations, and payment settings.
  • Oversee QA/delivery tests of the digital product.
Creator Responsibilities
  • Post warm-up stories, engaging stickers, and polls as scheduled.
  • Maintain authentic personal communication with the audience.
  • Avoid promoting any competing products/offers during this time.
Day 14 & Beyond • Launch & Monetize

Official Product Launch & Operations

The product goes live! Creator redirects audience to the bio link, and Operator starts optimization, tracking conversion rates, and managing customer inquiries/optimizations.

Operator Responsibilities
  • Monitor live traffic, checkout conversions, and sales metrics.
  • Handle customer delivery checks & technical infrastructure.
  • Analyze drop-offs and optimize checkout flows.
Creator Responsibilities
  • Publish the launch stories with clear calls-to-action (CTAs).
  • Engage with buyers, sharing initial feedback and testimonials.
  • Ensure bio links and highlights are fully optimized.

Agreement Clauses

Key legal and operational covenants protecting both parties during the collaboration.

  • Creator Ownership: The Creator retains full, absolute ownership of their personal brand, Instagram audience, likeness, and brand identity.
  • Co-Creation Model: The digital product is co-created specifically for the purpose of this collaboration.
  • No Independent Reuse: Neither party may reuse, modify, repackage, or sell the product independently without the explicit written consent of the other party.

Both parties agree to treat all strategy, marketing frameworks, customer pain-point databases, sales numbers, launch procedures, and financial details as strictly confidential. No information related to the operation or intellectual property of either party shall be shared publicly or with third parties without mutual consent.

Either party may terminate this collaboration agreement immediately if the specified responsibilities are not met or are persistently delayed without reasonable cause. In the event of termination, any net revenue earned from sales generated prior to the official termination date shall still be split in accordance with the agreed-upon rates (75% Creator / 25% Operator).

Agreement Acceptance

Type "Agreed" and enter the signatures to validate and finalize the partnership terms.
